display.purpose: Hero headings. Barlow 800 for Latin; Sarabun 800 for Thai. Max 6rem ceiling.

headline.purpose: Section titles and major content block headings.

title.purpose: Card headings, story section h3, subsection leaders.

body.purpose: Prose content. Sarabun 300 for Thai; Barlow 400 for Latin. Max 65–75ch line length.

label.purpose: Navigation items, badge text, captions, short metadata strings. Never body-length label copy.

shadows.name: interaction-rise
shadows.purpose: Cards on hover. Absent at rest. Never applied statically.

shadows.name: primary-action-glow
shadows.purpose: Primary buttons at rest. Intensifies to 0 12px 30px rgba(64,192,87,0.5) on hover.

shadows.name: nav-ambient
shadows.purpose: Fixed navigation bar. Always present to separate from scrolling content.

shadows.name: media-anchor
shadows.purpose: Large image containers. Anchors photography against the dark background.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions (hover, nav slide).

motion.name: ease-out-smooth
motion.purpose: Entrance animations. Used with fadeInUp and similar.

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Quick state changes: hover color shifts, opacity changes.

motion.name: duration-standard
motion.purpose: Standard transitions: card hover, button hover, nav item.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary CTA action. Used for map navigation and package CTAs.
components.html: 🗺️ เริ่มเดินทางสำรวจแผนที่
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { font-family: 'Barlow', 'Sarabun', sans-serif; padding: 14px 30px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; text-decoration: none; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; cursor: pointer; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #40c057 0%, #2b8a3e 100%); color: white; box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(64,192,87,0.3); border: none; transition: all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-3px); box-shadow: 0 12px 30px rgba(64,192,87,0.5); filter: brightness(1.1); }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Secondary/ghost CTA. Used alongside primary button in hero and CTA sections.
components.html: 🌿 ดูแพ็กเกจคาร์บอนต่ำ
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { font-family: 'Barlow', 'Sarabun', sans-serif; padding: 14px 30px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; text-decoration: none; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; cursor: pointer; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08); color: white; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15); backdrop-filter: blur(8px); transition: all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.15); border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.3); transform: translateY(-3px); }

components.name: Sight Card
components.description: Feature cards for attractions, activities, and highlights. Never use identical grids of these.
components.html:
🌅

กิ่วฝิ่น (Kiu Fin)

จุดชมวิวที่สูงจากระดับน้ำทะเล 1,517 เมตร ชมความงดงามของพระอาทิตย์ขึ้น
components.css: .ds-sight-card { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); border-radius: 16px; padding: 30px; backdrop-filter: blur(8px); transition: all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); position: relative; overflow: hidden; } .ds-sight-card::before { content: ''; position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 4px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #40c057, #2b8a3e); opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.3s ease; } .ds-sight-card:hover { transform: translateY(-10px); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06); border-color: rgba(64,192,87,0.3); box-shadow: 0 15px 35px rgba(0,0,0,0.4); } .ds-sight-card:hover::before { opacity: 1; } .ds-card-icon { font-size: 2.5rem; margin-bottom: 20px; } .ds-sight-card h3 { font-size: 1.35rem; font-weight: 700; color: white; margin-bottom: 12px; font-family: 'Barlow', 'Sarabun', sans-serif; } .ds-sight-card p { color: #ced4da; font-size: 0.95rem; line-height: 1.6; font-weight: 300; font-family: 'Sarabun', sans-serif; margin: 0; }

components.name: Glass Navigation Bar
components.description: Fixed top navigation with glassmorphism. The only component where glass effect is structural.
components.html:
MIANG MAP
Home🗺️ Interactive Map📦 Travel Packages
components.css: .ds-nav { position: relative; width: 100%; height: 80px; background: rgba(15,20,16,0.85); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(12px); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 0 30px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); box-shadow: 0 4px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.4); } .ds-nav-brand { color: white; font-size: 26px; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: 1.5px; text-transform: uppercase; font-family: 'Barlow', sans-serif; } .ds-nav-links { display: flex; gap: 15px; align-items: center; } .ds-nav-btn { background: none; border: none; color: #ccc; font-family: 'Barlow', sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer; padding: 10px 15px; transition: all 0.3s ease; text-decoration: none; position: relative; letter-spacing: 0.5px; border-radius: 4px; } .ds-nav-btn:hover { color: white; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); } .ds-nav-btn--active { color: #40c057; font-weight: 700; } .ds-nav-btn--active::after { content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: 2px; left: 15px; width: calc(100% - 30px); height: 3px; background: #40c057; border-radius: 2px; }

components.name: Hero Badge Chip
components.description: Used once in the hero section to signal category context. Never used on every section.
components.css: .ds-hero-badge { display: inline-block; background: rgba(64,192,87,0.2); color: #d3f9d8; border: 1px solid rgba(64,192,87,0.4); padding: 6px 16px; border-radius: 50px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 1px; text-transform: uppercase; font-family: 'Barlow', sans-serif; }

narrative.overview:
This is a visual system built like a worn field notebook found in a forest ranger's cabin: hand-stitched pages, pressed leaves, ink stamps, hand-written coordinates. Everything in this system feels discovered rather than manufactured. The dark forest floor background is not a "dark mode" choice — it is the forest at dusk, the ground you walk on. The green accent is not a brand color in the marketing-department sense; it is the color of a Miang tea leaf held up to the light. Authenticity is the aesthetic doctrine here, not modernity.

The system carries both Thai and English content with equal weight. Typography must support both scripts legibly without one feeling like a translation of the other. Sarabun handles Thai; Barlow handles headlines and Latin text. The pairing is functional before it is aesthetic — that too is in the spirit of the archive.

This system explicitly rejects: neon colors and aggressive motion, generic AI landing page conventions (cream backgrounds, tracking-heavy eyebrow labels, floating emoji icon cards, hero-metric stat boxes), corporate eco-tourism polish, and any generic Tourism Authority brochure register.
keyCharacteristics: Forest-floor dark as the surface — not dark mode, but the forest itself
Green accent used with restraint: it earns its appearance through purpose, not decoration
Glassmorphism as structural necessity (nav and overlays), not as aesthetic fashion
Bilingual-first: Thai and English given equal typographic respect
Motion is quiet: state-change feedback and gentle entrances; no choreography for its own sake
Depth is hover-activated: surfaces are flat at rest; shadows and elevation respond to interaction

rules.name: The Tea Leaf Restraint Rule
rules.body: Highland Tea Leaf (#40c057) appears only on interactive and active elements — primary buttons, active nav states, highlight icons. It is prohibited as a background at large scale. If it covers more than 15% of any view, it has lost its power.

rules.name: The Forest Tint Rule
rules.body: All neutral dark surfaces carry a trace of green (the #0f1410 base has perceptible green channels). Never use a neutral gray (#111111, #1a1a1a) as a background color; it reads as tech-dark, not forest.

rules.name: The Dual-Script Rule
rules.body: Thai text always uses Sarabun; Latin headings always use Barlow. Both must be declared in the font-family stack. Never use a Latin-only font for a Thai-language block.

rules.name: The Weight Contrast Rule
rules.body: Hierarchy is achieved through weight contrast (300 body vs. 800 display) before scale. A flat-weight scale at varying sizes reads as indecision; this system uses a ≥2x weight gap between body and display.

rules.name: The Flat-At-Rest Rule
rules.body: Static cards and containers have no shadow at rest. The shadow vocabulary applies on :hover or to floating/fixed elements only. A page where everything has a shadow at rest is a page where nothing feels interactive.

rules.name: The Green Glow Rule
rules.body: Box-shadow glows using the brand green (rgba(64,192,87,N)) are reserved for primary CTA buttons only. Applying the green glow to cards, containers, or arbitrary elements cheapens the primary action's distinctiveness.

dos: Do use Forest Floor (#0f1410) as the page background; it has an imperceptible green tint that distinguishes it from generic tech-dark.
Do apply Highland Tea Leaf (#40c057) to interactive elements: primary buttons, active nav indicators, highlight icons, and carbon point icons.
Do use Barlow 800 for all display headings; use Sarabun for all Thai-language body text and Thai headings.
Do verify all body text contrast at ≥4.5:1 against its background. Overcast Text (#d1d5db) on Forest Floor passes; any lighter gray does not.
Do apply glassmorphism (backdrop-filter: blur()) only to floating/fixed structural elements: the navigation bar and modal overlays.
Do include Sarabun in every font-family stack that will render Thai text.
Do use text-wrap: balance on h1–h3 for bilingual content.
Do keep animations quiet: ease-out curves, opacity + translateY entrances, prefers-reduced-motion fallbacks on every animation.
Do use card hover feedback via background, border-color, and shadow transitions — not by scaling or moving the card image.
donts: Don't use neon colors, high-saturation gradients, or aggressive motion. This brand is unhurried.
Don't use cream, sand, beige, or warm-neutral backgrounds (L 0.84–0.97, C < 0.06, hue 40–100). That is the generic AI aesthetic.
Don't apply the green glow (rgba(64,192,87,N)) to cards, section boxes, or decorative elements. Reserve it for primary CTA buttons only.
Don't use border-left stripes as a card accent.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text + gradient). All text uses a solid color from the palette.
Don't build identical card grids: same-sized cards with icon + heading + paragraph repeated across all cards.
Don't use tracked uppercase eyebrow labels above every section.
Don't use numbered section markers (01 / 02 / 03) unless the content is genuinely a sequential process.
Don't use copy buzzwords: seamless, world-class, next-generation, cutting-edge, game-changer.
Don't use a Latin-only font (Barlow alone) for blocks of Thai text.
